title: Pay Bands Guide
subtitle: Build and publish market-aligned salary structures.

prepareData.title: Phase 1: Prepare your data
prepareData.description: Import market benchmarks and configure grade mappings.

importBenchmarks.title: Step 1: Import market benchmarks
importBenchmarks.summary: Upload CSV files from survey providers (e.g., Mercer, WTW).
bullets: Open the 'Manage Data' area.
Enter a reference name to identify this dataset.
Upload your structured CSV file.
Confirm the successful import message.

configureMappings.title: Step 2: Configure mappings
configureMappings.summary: Define how external market grades map to your internal corporate grades.
bullets: Open the 'Mapping Configurations' area.
Click '+ Add Rule' to create a new mapping.
Select the data provider and country (optional).
Enter the vendor's grade code exactly as it appears in the survey.
Assign the corresponding internal grade.
Save the mappings.

buildScenario.title: Phase 2: Build Scenario
buildScenario.description: Create a mathematical salary structure model.

identity.title: Step 1: Scenario Identity
identity.summary: Set basic parameters for the new structure.
bullets: Click '+ Create Scenario' from the main dashboard.
Enter a clear Name, Target Country, and Base Type (e.g., Base Salary).
Select the Pricing Date (base date of market data) and Effective Dates.

weights.title: Step 2: Weights and Policies
bullets: Allocate 100% weight across data providers (Global or By Grade).
Select an Aging Policy to adjust data for inflation/time.
Select Data Quality and Range Spread policies.
Click 'Calculate & Finish' to generate the mathematical structure.

reviewPublish.title: Phase 3: Review & Publish
reviewPublish.description: Analyze the calculated results and activate the structure.

workbench.title: Scenario Workbench
workbench.summary: Review the exact financial values for the proposed bands.
bullets: Analyze the aged market median for each internal grade.
Review the proposed minimum, midpoint, and maximum limits.
Check the calculated spread and explainability score.

publish.title: Publish Structure
publish.summary: Make the structure officially active for the organization.
bullets: If the proposed numbers align with business strategy, click 'Publish Structure'.
The model freezes and becomes the active pay structure in the system for the specified parameters.
